What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman wearing a light pink spaghetti strap top and gold earrings stands facing a man in a white long-sleeved button-down shirt. The man holds a brown glass bottle while the woman holds a champagne flute. Behind them, a woman in a white top with a red floral pattern holds a glass containing amber liquid. They are gathered outdoors in front of a white building facade with large arched windows.
